description: Style Note enamor's range of flirty and pretty nightdresses are quite impressive. Capturing the mood of the season in the colours, fabric and designs, your beauty sleep is is made even more comfortable by this range. Enjoy the obvious cutesy look of this pink nightdress. Product Details Brown short sleeveless nightdress, has a V neckline with a lace patch at the apex of the V, lace detail under the arms, netted back yoke with lace detail and irregular hemline Material and Care Fabric: 91% nylon and 9% spandex Trims: 86% nylon and 14% elastic Hand wash Do not bleach Do not iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size L
